title: NEARBY NATURE - 211info
text: NEARBY NATURE NEARBY NATURE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Staff and volunteers lead nature walks, host school programs, sponsor special events, teach both in-person and virtual youth programs, and help with environmental restoration projects. Nearby Nature also maintains an educational Learnscape Garden as well. 622 Day Island Road Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 687-9699 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 687-9699 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service, scholarships available DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish may be available at some summer camps AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in Alton Baker Park Services: Camps Outdoor Environmental Education Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
